label: FACIS DSP — Negotiations
info:
FR-DSP-002 — Contract Negotiation. Out of scope per SRS §3.2; this is a
minimal stub that auto-finalises so transfer requests have a valid
agreementId to reference.

  POST   /dsp/negotiations              — auto-finalise; 202 + {negotiationId}
  GET    /dsp/negotiations/:id          — return NegotiationProcess; 404 if missing
  POST   /dsp/negotiations/:id/terminate — set state TERMINATED; 200

ID format mirrors Python: neg-<12 lowercase hex>, agr-<12 lowercase hex>.
State machine: REQUESTED → FINALIZED (immediate) → TERMINATED.
After every mutation, fires dsp.persist.negotiations to checkpoint the
flow.get('negotiations') map to disk.

name: auto-finalise
read by id
terminate
